title: Kalpataru Elitus
location: Central Mumbai, LBS Road, Mulund West
description: Kalpataru Elitus offers thoughtfully designed residences with premium finishes, expansive decks, and panoramic city views. Located along LBS Road with excellent connectivity to Eastern Express Highway and upcoming metro corridors, the project features landscaped podiums, a clubhouse, and dedicated work-from-home friendly spaces. RERA-registered development with transparent timelines and structured payment plans for end-users and investors.

title: Kalpataru Summit
description: A prestigious Grade A office configuration in Mulund with efficient floor plates, high-speed elevators, and smart building management. Ideal for corporates seeking visibility, accessibility, and a future-ready workspace with ample parking and retail on the lower levels.

title: Skyline Residency Powai
description: Lake-facing towers with podium amenities including infinity pool, indoor games, and co-working lounge. Minutes from IIT Bombay and Hiranandani business district with strong rental demand.

title: Palm Grove Thane
description: Family-centric community with landscaped gardens, jogging track, and senior citizen sit-outs. Proximity to schools, hospitals, and upcoming metro station.

title: Harbour View Chembur
description: Spacious corner units with harbour glimpses, private lift lobby options, and imported marble flooring. Premium specifications with home automation readiness.

title: Urban Nest Bandra
description: Fully furnished sea-facing rental with modular kitchen, inverter ACs, and covered parking. Quiet lane yet walking distance to cafes and the promenade.

title: Creek Heights Navi Mumbai
description: Semi-furnished apartment near Seawoods Grand Central with metro access, mall, and office hubs. Ideal for young professionals.

title: Lotus Court Kalyan
description: Affordable homes with zero-dead-space layouts, rainwater harvesting, and solar-ready rooftops. Strong connectivity via Kalyan station and upcoming ring road.

title: Emerald Towers Worli
description: Ultra-luxury sky residences with private elevators, sky lounge, and concierge services. Unobstructed sea views and proximity to business districts.

title: Gardenia Phase 2
description: Low-density towers overlooking central greens, with squash court, gym, and indoor kids’ play. Excellent schools and hospitals within 10 minutes.
